description: High-Side Protection Controller With Low Quiescent Current

1.name: SENSE
1.description: Input voltage sense: a constant current sink (16 µA typical) at the SENSE pin flows through an external resistor to set the threshold for fault detection.

2.name: VIN
2.description: Supply voltage input: the operating voltage range is 5.5 V to 65 V.

3.name: OVP
3.description: Over-voltage protection comparator input: an external resistor divider from the system input voltage sets the Over-Voltage turn-off threshold.

4.name: UVLO
4.description: Under-voltage lock-out comparator input: used as an input under-voltage lock-out by connecting this pin to a resistor divider between input supply voltage and ground.

5.name: EN
5.description: Enable input: a voltage less than 0.8 V switches the device to a low current shutdown state. Includes an internal 6 µA pull-down.

7.name: TIMER
7.description: Timing capacitor: an external capacitor connected to this pin sets the VDS fault detection delay time.

8.name: nPGD
8.description: Fault status: an open drain output. Active low indicates a fault condition.

9.name: OUT
9.description: Output voltage sense: connect to the output rail (external MOSFET source). Internally used to detect VDS and VGS conditions.

10.name: GATE
10.description: Gate drive output: connect to the external MOSFET's gate. A charge-pump driven constant current source charges the GATE pin.

POREN.parameter: Power on reset threshold at VIN

POREN_VIN_rising__TJ____40_C_to_125.parameter: Power on reset threshold at VIN

IOUT-EN_OUT___VIN__normal_operation__T.conditions: OUT = VIN, normal operation, TJ = -40°C to 125°C

ISENSE_SENSE_pin_bias_current__TJ.conditions: SENSE pin bias current, TJ = -40°C to 125°C

VOFFSET.conditions: SENSE - OUT voltage for fault detection, TJ = 25°C

VOFFSET_SENSE___OUT_voltage_for_fault.conditions: SENSE - OUT voltage for fault detection, TJ = -40°C to 125°C

OVPTH.conditions: OVP pin threshold voltage rising, TJ = 25°C

OVPTH_OVP_pin_threshold_voltage_risi.conditions: OVP pin threshold voltage rising, TJ = -40°C to 125°C

OVPDEL.conditions: Delay from OVP pin > OVPTH to GATE low

UVLOTH.conditions: UVLO pin threshold voltage rising, TJ = 25°C

UVLOTH_UVLO_pin_threshold_voltage_ris.conditions: UVLO pin threshold voltage rising, TJ = -40°C to 125°C

VGATE.parameter: Gate output voltage in normal operation
VGATE.conditions: GATE - VIN voltage, GATE pin open, TJ = 25°C

VGATE_GATE___VIN_voltage__GATE_pin_o.parameter: Gate output voltage in normal operation
VGATE_GATE___VIN_voltage__GATE_pin_o.conditions: GATE - VIN voltage, GATE pin open, TJ = -40°C to 125°C

VGATE-TH.conditions: GATE - OUT threshold voltage for TIMER voltage reset and TIMER current change, TJ = 25°C

VGATE-TH_GATE___OUT_threshold_voltage_f.conditions: GATE - OUT threshold voltage for TIMER voltage reset and TIMER current change, TJ = -40°C to 125°C

VGATE-CLAMP.parameter: Zener clamp between GATE pin and OUT pin

ITIMERH.parameter: Timer charge current for VDS fault
ITIMERH.conditions: TIMER charge current after start-up, VGS = 6.5 V, TJ = 25°C

ITIMERH_TIMER_charge_current_after_sta.parameter: Timer charge current for VDS fault
ITIMERH_TIMER_charge_current_after_sta.conditions: TIMER charge current after start-up, VGS = 6.5 V, TJ = -40°C to 125°C

ITIMERL.conditions: TIMER charge current during start-up, VGS = 3.5 V, TJ = 25°C

ITIMERL_TIMER_charge_current_during_st.conditions: TIMER charge current during start-up, VGS = 3.5 V, TJ = -40°C to 125°C

tFAULT.conditions: TIMER pin > 2.0 V, No load on GATE pin

recommended_external_components.snippet: R8 sets the OVP threshold from VIN to OVP in the typical application.
R10 works with the fixed lower UVLO resistor to set turn-on voltage.
RS and RO program the VDS-based current limit network.
Q1 is the external high-side pass MOSFET in the hot-swap path.
The TIMER capacitor sets startup and VDS fault delay behavior.

component_value_hints.snippet: Typical application component values for OVP, UVLO, sense resistor, and TIMER capacitor.

layout_hints.hint: Keep the current-sense path short and away from switching nodes.

design_recommendations.note: Keep the lower UVLO resistor fixed at 10 kOhm to reduce bias-current induced threshold error.
Use the typical application component values as a validation point for generated calculator outputs.

ITIMERH.description: Timer charge current for VDS fault

application_notes.title: R11 Fixed Value Recommendation
application_notes.content: Keep the UVLO divider bottom resistor at 10 kOhm and solve only the upper resistor for the target threshold.
application_notes.rationale: This keeps UVLO threshold error and UVLO bias-current sensitivity bounded across the operating range.

application_notes.title: Sense Resistor Placement
application_notes.content: Keep the current-sense path short and route it away from high di/dt switching current loops.
application_notes.rationale: Noise on the SENSE and OUT path can corrupt the programmed VDS threshold.
application_notes.consequence: False overcurrent triggering or delayed fault response.

application_notes.title: MOSFET RDS(ON) Selection
application_notes.content: Choose the pass MOSFET so the expected VDS drop at current limit stays above the comparator offset margin.
application_notes.rationale: The VOFFSET tolerance directly impacts the usable current-limit threshold window.

application_notes.title: Feedback Divider Bias
application_notes.content: Keep the lower UVLO resistor fixed at 10 kOhm to reduce bias-current induced threshold error.

application_notes.title: Recommended Component Values
application_notes.content: Use the typical application component values as a validation point for generated calculator outputs.

application_notes.title: Layout Guidance
application_notes.content: Keep the current-sense path short and away from switching nodes.
